---
name: Platform Update
about: Report a content platform change (character limits, algorithm updates, new features)
title: "[Platform] "
labels: platform-update
assignees: ''
---

## Platform
Which platform changed? (LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Email, etc.)

## What Changed
Describe the update — new character limits, algorithm change, new content format, deprecated feature, etc.

## Source
Link to the official announcement or documentation.

## Date of Change
When did this take effect?

## Impact on Skill
Which sections of the skill need updating? (SKILL.md, references/platforms.md, references/templates.md, etc.)

## Suggested Update
If you know the fix, describe or paste the corrected text.
